description: Scenario count × contingency count equals N-1 dataset rows.
Final violation label equals OR of all component violation flags.
Feature lists do not include post-contingency labels or metrics.
Threshold is selected on validation set, not test set.
Scenario-group and contingency-group CV results are included.
Top-k screening table is finite and monotonic.
LaTeX tables are generated under paper/tables.
Paper figures are copied under paper/figures with manifest.
Each main claim has a linked evidence artifact.
